title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costco India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costco India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Costco India Ventures Solutions in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India Ventures Solutions:
Costco India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India Ventures Solutions!
